name: AutoResearch
description: Claude Code skill for automated research — installs slash commands for literature search, paper analysis, and research planning directly into your Claude workflow.

commands.name: /autoresearch:plan
commands.description: Generate a research plan from a topic

requirements.note: Requires Claude Code CLI to be installed and available in PATH

name: AutoResearchClaw
description: 23-stage automated research pipeline — from topic initialization to full paper generation with experiments, charts, and references.
